variants._comment:: ($self$) 成为欺凌者 口上文
($self$) 欺凌关系结束 口上文
($self$) 成为被欺凌者 口上文
($self$) 欺凌关系结束 口上文

zh-cn.relationship_bully_propose_A_1: ($self$) (this should never trigger) relationship_bully_propose_A 口上文
zh-cn.relationship_bully_set_A_1: $self$路过$target$身旁时，像是无意般用肩膀重重撞了过去，随后发出了一声充满轻蔑的冷笑。
zh-cn.relationship_bully_set_A_2: $self$抱臂伫立在走廊尽头，投向$target$的目光中，肆无忌惮地流淌着恶意与嘲讽。
zh-cn.relationship_bully_set_A_3: 在众目睽睽之下，$self$漫不经心地将$target$桌上的物品扫落在地。"哎呀，手滑了呢。"
zh-cn.relationship_bully_set_A_4: $self$毫不客气地大声打断了$target$的发言，翻了个大大的白眼。"刚才是不是有苍蝇在嗡嗡叫？吵死了。"
zh-cn.relationship_bully_set_A_5: $self$指尖缠绕着发梢，对着同伴指点着$target$窃窃私语，随即爆发出一阵刺耳又尖锐的哄笑。
zh-cn.relationship_bully_set_A_6: $self$逼近到$target$面前，居高临下地俯视着对方，嘴角勾起一抹残忍的弧度。"这就想哭了？好戏才刚刚开场呢。"
zh-cn.relationship_bully_break_A_1: $self$远远瞥了$target$一眼，随后神情淡漠地转身离去，没有像往常那样上前找茬。
zh-cn.relationship_bully_break_A_2: 在走廊相遇的瞬间，$self$移开了视线假装没看见$target$，脚步匆匆地擦肩而过。
zh-cn.relationship_bully_break_A_3: $self$有些不耐烦地挥手制止了同伴对$target$的挑衅。"算了，今天没心情，放那家伙一马。"
zh-cn.relationship_bully_break_A_4: $self$盯着$target$的背影，原本想要伸出的脚默默收了回来，抿紧嘴唇一言不发。
zh-cn.relationship_bully_break_A_5: $self$经过$target$的课桌时顿了顿脚步，最终什么也没做，只是轻轻哼了一声便走开了。
zh-cn.relationship_bully_break_A_6: $self$避开了$target$投来的视线，神情显得有些不自然，似乎在极力回避之前的冲突记忆。
zh-cn.relationship_bully_propose_B_1: ($self$) (this should never trigger) relationship_bully_propose_B 口上文
zh-cn.relationship_bully_set_B_1: 看着$target$一步步逼近，$self$的身体不由自主地瑟缩起来，本能地四下张望想要寻找藏身之处。
zh-cn.relationship_bully_set_B_2: $self$将书本紧紧护在胸前，低垂着头不敢与$target$对视，脚步慌乱地向后退去。
zh-cn.relationship_bully_set_B_3: $self$被$target$逼到了墙角退无可退，脸色苍白如纸，嘴唇颤抖着却发不出一丝声音。
zh-cn.relationship_bully_set_B_4: $self$眼眶泛红，在这个曾经被自己轻视的人面前，她第一次品尝到了深深的无力与恐惧感。
zh-cn.relationship_bully_set_B_5: $self$慌手慌脚地收拾着散落一地的物品，一边战战兢兢地偷瞄$target$的动作，生怕再次招致对方的攻击。
zh-cn.relationship_bully_set_B_6: $self$一听到$target$的名字，整个人猛地僵住，眼神中流露出掩饰不住的惊恐。
zh-cn.relationship_bully_break_B_1: 发现$target$径直走过并没有停留，$self$倚靠着墙壁长出了一口气，一直紧绷的肩膀终于垮了下来。
zh-cn.relationship_bully_break_B_2: $self$疑惑地望着$target$远去的背影，眼神里交织着不解和某种劫后余生的庆幸。
zh-cn.relationship_bully_break_B_3: $self$小心翼翼地抬起头，反复确认$target$真的没有恶意后，才敢试探性地迈出脚步。
zh-cn.relationship_bully_break_B_4: 虽然$target$已经停止了针对，但$self$依然保持着十二分的警惕，像一只受惊的小兽般时刻准备逃跑。
zh-cn.relationship_bully_break_B_5: $self$愣在原地许久，似乎不敢相信那场无休止的噩梦就这样莫名其妙地结束了。
zh-cn.relationship_bully_break_B_6: $self$用复杂的眼神注视着$target$，手里紧紧攥着的衣角也慢慢松开了，掌心满是冷汗。

en-us.relationship_bully_propose_A_1: ($self$) (this should never trigger) relationship_bully_propose_A intro text
en-us.relationship_bully_set_A_1: As $self$ passes by $target$, she deliberately bumps into you with her shoulder, hard, followed by a contemptuous sneer.
en-us.relationship_bully_set_A_2: $self$ stands at the end of the hallway with her arms crossed, looking at $target$ with eyes full of undisguised malice and mockery.
en-us.relationship_bully_set_A_3: Right in front of everyone, $self$ casually sweeps $target$'s belongings off the desk. "Oops, slipped my hand."
en-us.relationship_bully_set_A_4: $self$ loudly interrupts $target$ while you are speaking, rolling her eyes dramatically. "Was there a fly buzzing? So noisy."
en-us.relationship_bully_set_A_5: $self$ twirls her hair with her finger, whispering to her friends while pointing at $target$, before bursting into a sharp, piercing laugh.
en-us.relationship_bully_set_A_6: $self$ walks up to $target$, looking down at you with a cruel smirk curling her lips. "Crying already? The show has just begun."
en-us.relationship_bully_break_A_1: $self$ glances at $target$ from a distance, then turns away indifferently, not coming over to pick a fight like usual.
en-us.relationship_bully_break_A_2: Meeting in the corridor, $self$ averts her gaze, pretending not to see $target$ and hurriedly brushing past.
en-us.relationship_bully_break_A_3: $self$ waves her hand impatiently to stop her friends from provoking $target$. "Forget it, not in the mood today. Let that guy go."
en-us.relationship_bully_break_A_4: $self$ stares at $target$'s back, quietly retracting the foot she intended to trip you with, pursing her lips in silence.
en-us.relationship_bully_break_A_5: $self$ pauses slightly as she passes by $target$'s desk, but ultimately does nothing, just scoffing lightly before walking away.
en-us.relationship_bully_break_A_6: $self$ avoids the gaze $target$ casts her way, looking somewhat unnatural, as if trying hard to avoid the memories of past conflicts.
en-us.relationship_bully_propose_B_1: ($self$) (this should never trigger) relationship_bully_propose_B intro text
en-us.relationship_bully_set_B_1: Seeing $target$ approaching, $self$ instinctively shrinks back, her eyes darting around as if looking for a place to hide.
en-us.relationship_bully_set_B_2: $self$ clutches her books tightly against her chest, lowering her head to avoid eye contact with $target$, retreating in panic.
en-us.relationship_bully_set_B_3: $self$ is cornered by $target$, her face pale as a sheet, lips trembling but unable to make a sound.
en-us.relationship_bully_set_B_4: $self$'s eyes turn red. In front of the person she once despised, she feels a deep sense of powerlessness and fear for the first time.
en-us.relationship_bully_set_B_5: $self$ scrambles to pick up her scattered belongings, stealing fearful glances at $target$, terrified of provoking another attack.
en-us.relationship_bully_set_B_6: $self$ freezes instantly upon hearing $target$'s name, her eyes revealing unconcealed terror.
en-us.relationship_bully_break_B_1: Realizing $target$ walked past without stopping, $self$ leans against the wall and lets out a long breath, her tense shoulders finally slumping.
en-us.relationship_bully_break_B_2: $self$ looks at $target$'s retreating figure with confusion, her eyes filled with disbelief and a sense of relief.
en-us.relationship_bully_break_B_3: $self$ cautiously lifts her head, and only after confirming $target$ truly means no harm, does she dare to take a tentative step.
en-us.relationship_bully_break_B_4: Although $target$ has stopped targeting her, $self$ remains on high alert, ready to flee like a frightened animal.
en-us.relationship_bully_break_B_5: $self$ stands dazed for a long time, unable to believe that the endless nightmare has ended so inexplicably.
en-us.relationship_bully_break_B_6: $self$ gazes at $target$ with a complicated expression, her hand slowly loosening its grip on her hem, palm slick with cold sweat.
